name: yun-kan-xhs-growth
description: Analyze Coupang product Excel data and create Xiaohongshu promotion notes for YunKan Data.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze Coupang data and draft Xiaohongshu posts.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for cross-border ecommerce operators. It analyzes uploaded Coupang product Excel exports, turns the findings into a Xiaohongshu-style seed content note for YunKan Data, generates a cover image prompt, and can help publish through a logged-in Xiaohongshu browser session.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this Coupang Excel and write a YunKan Xiaohongshu note
Generate a Xiaohongshu cover for this YunKan campaign
Prepare this YunKan note in my logged-in Xiaohongshu account
